name: Mim's Cabbage Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 can tomatoes, peeled and crushed (16 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate cabbage into leaves and stack loosely in a large skillet.
2. Add 1/4 cup cold water to the skillet. Cover and steam cabbage leaves until soft. Cool.
3. In a bowl, combine ground beef, nutmeg, rice, cold water, and eggs.
4. Place 1/4 cup meat mixture in the center of each leaf. Roll up the cabbage leaf, seam side down, and place the rolls seam-side down in a baking pan.
5. To make sauce: Mash canned tomatoes and mix with tomato sauce. Add brown sugar, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
6. Pour the sauce over the cabbage rolls.
7. Cover the dish and bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. Remove cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
Serving Ideas:
- Scratch Biscuits
- Fruit Salad
Notes:
- A meal-in-one!
